title: FMD - Using Play Button when only one earbud is connected
scenario: Verify Find My Device tone plays correctly on individual earbuds when only one earbud is connected
steps: Launch app and pair both earbuds.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > Find My Device. Verify device is recognized on map and list.
Disconnect right earbud, select left earbud, tap Play Button, tap 'Ok Got it', tap Play Button again.
Close popup, reconnect right earbud, disconnect left earbud, trigger tone for right earbud.
expected: Step 3: Tone plays on left earbud, "Sending tone..." message with animated stop button and illustration. Step 4: Tone stops, Play button displayed. Step 5: Tone plays on right earbud with same animations. Step 6: Tone stops, Play button displayed.
